authorityPosture: No artifact in this register is active law until copied/promoted into the active authority set and recorded there.

promotionCandidates.prerequisite: architect review confirms these are protective clarifications, not semantic rewrites
promotionCandidates.riskIfPromotedEarly: could over-constrain future runtime design if wording is too implementation-specific

promotionCandidates.prerequisite: review against Authority Action Matrix and Platform Enforcement Architecture
promotionCandidates.riskIfPromotedEarly: AI coding-agent guidance could be mistaken for runtime model law

promotionCandidates.prerequisite: no-side-effect rule and trace semantics reviewed
promotionCandidates.riskIfPromotedEarly: preflight may become execution-by-another-name unless side effects are tightly forbidden

promotionCandidates.prerequisite: action-matrix pass covering human-only defaults and agent draft/review paths
promotionCandidates.riskIfPromotedEarly: software agents may appear equivalent to accountable human parties

promotionCandidates.prerequisite: schemas validate and hostile tests cover handoff, revocation, stale basis, and trace gaps
promotionCandidates.riskIfPromotedEarly: multi-agent sessions could be underspecified and become hidden governance channels

promotionCandidates.prerequisite: manifest fields remain actual deployment self-description, not aspirational feature listing
promotionCandidates.riskIfPromotedEarly: capability manifests may overclaim agent support

promotionCandidates.prerequisite: research pass or hostile review confirms Advisory-only boundary and no third twin
promotionCandidates.riskIfPromotedEarly: world-model state may become hidden current state

promotionCandidates.prerequisite: noise controls and compliance-blocking basis requirements reviewed
promotionCandidates.riskIfPromotedEarly: AI-generated task spam could burden farmers or imply obligations without basis
